modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Emails are going to the deleted folder instead of inbox.

full_description_text: I am having problem with my emails. They are not coming to my inbox, they go to deleted folder. Even calendar updates are going to deleted folder, but I see the meeting on my calendar. I get error message about the meeting not found.
short_description: Emails are going to the deleted folder instead of inbox.
description: I am having problem with my emails. They are not coming to my inbox, they go to deleted folder. Even calendar updates are going to deleted folder, but I see the meeting on my calendar. I get error message about the meeting not found.
